Lote code after 12

I noticed this earlier today that TG3 has a timing problem with the kickoffs. In L2 we would take these slow motion videos and make adjustments to a certain set of parameters that are unnamed and only accessible from the raw parameters screen. Unfortunately you have to know the exact parameter you want to adjust and only theegarten has that list. They give us the numbers as we need them. It's been a long time and I don't recall the numbers. It's somewhere in the 800s. I sent an email to theegarten today to get those numbers so we can dial some of this stuff in on our own.
That video didn't upload in slow motion for some reason.
The timing is off, it starts early, hitting a good bar and then shoots between the two bad bars on the second pulse
Kimberly Morales Alan Greer Julia just replied to my email asking for the parameters and she basically said just clean the belts and the bars won't turn as much.
I replied, doubling down on the need for these parameters, but for now perhaps we can get the belts from the 275 to the 270 cleaned up really good and see how it does in the meantime?
It’s been an ongoing issue since 2nd shift, we’ll do another CIL.

Belts were separated to create more of a bit, it helped a bit however scrap and rework is still being accumulated at a higher pace than usual. I’ll see if maintenance can possibly reach out to L2. Kavin Ayala
Jam occured in the cold stamping section due to incorrect mold size

Today, at the end of the cleaning activities, the Production staff was organizing and placing the materials in their respective places when they detected a bag of cookies inside the cabinet where the parts of the machine are stored.
Although the product was inside a bag, its presence in this area represents a potential risk of contamination for the protected parts, so it is important to keep these spaces free of food and objects unrelated to the process.Charity Young, Ebrima Dibba
